title: Processor mailbox proof: 68K -> SH2M -> SH2S -> reduced result -> 68K
emulator: PicoDrive (libretro, local build w/ memory-access patch)

processor_roles.MAIN68K: command issue (COMM0/1), result render, ACK-by-clear protocol
processor_roles.SUB68K: BLOCKED: Sega CD BIOS not available; CD block-load deferred to M3

honesty_notes: Work function is a synthetic deterministic table-sum, not model inference (that is M6+).
